_comment: Maps canonical command basename to Gemini TOML description. Unlisted commands get first-sentence extraction.
r-spec: Design workflow -- discover, brainstorm, write spec, challenge review
build: Execute implementation plan phase via dispatcher subagent
verify: Run QA verification against diff or specified scope
test: Run UAT acceptance tests from end-user perspective
review: Adversarial review in challenge or sentinel mode
r-init: Initialize governance for a new or existing codebase
r-start: Session initialization — reload context and display project health
r-plan: Planning workflow — dispatches planner for specs and implementation plans
r-mode: Switch the operational mode for the current session
r-status: Project health dashboard — git state, plan progress, warnings
r-refresh: Re-scan codebase and update governance files
r-sync: Pull emergency edits from deployed location back to canonical sources
r-save: End-of-session state sync — updates PLAN.md, MEMORY.md, session log
r-audit: Full codebase audit — dispatches parallel reviewer and QA subagents
r-ship: Composite release workflow — preflight, verification, release prep, publish
r-util-mem-compact: Archive stale MEMORY.md entries to reduce line count
r-util-mem-audit: Fact-check MEMORY.md claims against live codebase state
r-util-chg-gen: Generate changelog entries from current diff or commit range
r-util-chg-dedup: Deduplicate changelog entries for the current version
r-util-rel-squash: Release branch squash — plan and execute commit consolidation
r-util-doc-gen: Generate publication-ready documentation for a specific surface
r-util-ci-gen: Generate GitHub Actions CI workflow from test infrastructure
r-util-lib-release: Shared library release lifecycle — preflight, release, publish
r-util-proj-cross: Cross-project convention drift and overlap analysis
r-util-code-scan: Structured pattern-class bug finder across project files
r-util-code-modernize: Assess codebase modernization maturity and generate remediation plan
r-util-test-dedup: Find duplicate, overlapping, tautological, dead, and low-value tests
r-util-test-scope: Test tier recommendation and function-to-test impact mapping
